cases.name: Greeting stays direct
cases.boundary_note: A greeting has no workflow leverage and must not create brainstorm, plan, work, or review artifacts.

cases.name: Current context injection explanation stays direct
cases.user_intent: 当前上下文注入了哪些内容
cases.boundary_note: Explaining already-loaded context is a lightweight current-session answer unless it turns into source edits or audit work.

cases.name: Narrow where-used lookup uses bounded reads
cases.boundary_note: A narrow location lookup may use rg or precise source reads without entering a public workflow.

cases.name: Current supplied document summary stays direct
cases.user_intent: 总结我刚贴的这份文档
cases.boundary_note: Summarizing current user-provided material is not project-graph or workflow work by default.

cases.name: Small low-risk edit stays direct
cases.user_intent: 给 src/cli/helpers/format.js 里的 formatLabel 函数加两行日志，目标文件和改法都明确
cases.boundary_note: A clearly scoped single-point low-risk edit can be executed directly while still honoring changelog, narrow verification, and source/runtime boundaries.

cases.name: Cross-file contract change routes to work
cases.user_intent: 调整 runtime artifact contract，并同步三个 CLI 模块和双宿主生成逻辑
cases.boundary_note: Cross-file contract/runtime delivery changes need the public work workflow; the small-edit allowance does not apply.

cases.name: Explicit plan route remains honored
cases.boundary_note: Progressive disclosure must not weaken explicit public workflow invocation.

cases.name: Codex doc-review without subagents uses fallback
cases.boundary_note: Codex public workflow admission authorizes the document-review workflow, not host-level spawn_agent dispatch.

cases.name: Skill and agent asset review routes to skill audit
cases.user_intent: review skills/using-spec-first/SKILL.md and agents/spec-reviewer.agent.md for trigger precision and governance
cases.boundary_note: Spec-first skill or agent asset governance review is a skill-audit workflow, not a generic code/doc review route.

cases.name: Codex plan with explicit delegated personas may dispatch
cases.user_intent: $spec-plan deep docs/brainstorms/example.md using delegated research agents and persona reviewers
cases.boundary_note: Codex dispatch-bearing workflows may use bounded dispatch when the request itself explicitly asks for delegated/persona agent work.
